channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Starbucks and other retailers hit with ongoing ransomware attack on software provider
item.description: Major supply-chain software provider Blue Yonder is working to restore its systems after a ransomware attack hit the Panasonic-owned firm last week. Blue Yonder, which counts Starbucks, major U.K.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: This TikTok user says a popular YouTube music channel is in fact AI
item.description: Are you really a student if you’ve not done a late night study session soundtracked to an unending lo-fi beats playlist on YouTube? According to Google Trends, searches for the term “lo-fi” on YouTube have tripled since 2020.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Escalar una empresa de dispositivos médicos: el recorrido de un CIO
item.description: Cuando comencé en Novanta hace alrededor de un lustro, mi primera misión fue brindar escalabilidad a nuestras soluciones empresariales, así como desarrollar una hoja de ruta digital para modernizar la huella tecnológica, reducir la deuda técnica y explorar estrategias para garantizar un crecimiento
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Ayesa pisa el acelerador de la transformación digital con su Value Tech Hub
item.description: Ayesa pisa el acelerador en materia de transformación digital, inteligencia artificial, datos y ciberseguridad.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Don't chance it. Secure your retirement accounts with a VPN and protect your future
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to safeguard retirement accounts from cyber threats with a VPN: encryption, anonymity, secure access.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk Teases Possibility of Buying MSNBC
item.description: Controversial billionaire Elon Musk responds to speculation about buying MSNBC, sparking debate and raising questions about media ownership and bias.
item.dc:creator: Brian Niemietz, The Mercury News

item.title: Most young knowledge workers using AI: Poll
item.description: The vast majority of Generation Z knowledge workers said they are using artificial intelligence (AI) tools in their work, according to a new study, underscoring the increased embrace of the advancing technology.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Cerebras claims record in molecular dynamics simulations, says it’s 748x faster than Frontier supercomputer
item.description: Cerebras Systems, the maker of an AI “chip” the size of a pizza box, is making some impressive claims about its AI processing performance. At the recent Supercomputing 24 show, Cerebras announced a breakthrough in molecular dynamics simulations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Supreme Court allows multibillion-dollar class action to proceed against Meta
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is allowing a multibillion-dollar class action investors’ lawsuit to proceed against Facebook parent Meta, stemming from the privacy scandal involving the Cambridge Analytica political consulting firm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Hypersonic jet promises NYC to London in under an hour
item.description: A Texas company is developing a hypersonic jet, Stargazer, that could fly from New York City to London in under an hour, redefining boundaries of aviation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to bring Android 16’s Notification Cooldown brilliance to any phone today
item.description: Well, I’ll be: We’ve just barely finished welcoming Google’s Android 15 update into the world, and already, Android 16 is teasing us with a tiny early taste. Yes, indeedly: Google has now officially launched the first developer preview of next year’s Android 16 software.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Thai court dismisses activist's suit against Israeli spyware producer over lack of evidence
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — A Thai court on Thursday threw out a lawsuit brought by a pro-democracy activist which alleged spyware produced by an Israeli tech firm had been used to hack his phone.
item.dc:creator: JERRY HARMER and DAVID RISING, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meta's Threads app launches custom feeds amid Bluesky surge
item.description: The rollout came just days after Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg announced last week that Threads was testing the new feature.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Kotlin for Java developers: Classes and coroutines
item.description: Java is one of the classic object-oriented languages, so classes and objects are of special interest to Java developers. Object-oriented programming gives you considerable power, particularly when it comes to structuring and organizing programs as they grow larger.
item.dc:creator: Info World
